corpus.title: FIFA boss referred to Olympics ethics board over Trump World Cup call
corpus.signal_text:
FIFA boss referred to Olympics ethics board over Trump World Cup call

Gianni Infantino's close ties with Donald Trump continue to land him in hot water after the US President's World Cup intervention.

corpus.title: FIFA defends Balogun ruling despite concerns over World Cup's integrity
corpus.signal_text:
FIFA defends Balogun ruling despite concerns over World Cup's integrity

FIFA’s decision to lift United States striker Folarin Balogun's red-card ban after an intervention from US President Donald Trump has reignited a global debate over political influence in sport and the independence of football's governing bodies.

corpus.title: Trump threatens America's World Cup goodwill with one phone call
corpus.signal_text:
Trump threatens America's World Cup goodwill with one phone call

World Cup fans' romance with America has soured after FIFA suspended a red-card ban on U.S. striker Folarin Balogun for the match against Belgium.Why it matters: Soccer officials and fans allege that FIFA is bending its own disciplinary rules under political pressure from President Trump — raising questions about whether the sport's governing body is giving the U.S. a boost due to the president's close relationship with FIFA president Gianni Infantino.Catch up quick: FIFA ultimately used Article

corpus.title: Trump called FIFA's Infantino over Balogun suspension
corpus.signal_text:
Trump called FIFA's Infantino over Balogun suspension

President Trump called FIFA president Gianni Infantino about U.S. striker Folarin Balogun's controversial red card and resulting suspension before soccer's governing body lifted the ban, a U.S. official tells Axios.Why it matters: The reversal — and the White House's role in it — has become the biggest twist of this year's World Cup. That means Balogun is eligible for the knockout stage after his red card had threatened to sideline him.The big picture: The president's involvement illustrates how

corpus.title: Outrage as FIFA's Infantino bends rules to Trump's whim at World Cup
corpus.signal_text:
Outrage as FIFA's Infantino bends rules to Trump's whim at World Cup

FIFA boss slammed for controversial decision to suspend US star Folarin Balogun's one-game ban; Ruling, which came after the intervention of Donald Trump, permits striker to play in the co-hosts' World Cup last 16 match with Belgium. Leer más

corpus.title: Belgium appeals against FIFA's Folarin Balogun ban decision
corpus.signal_text:
Belgium appeals against FIFA's Folarin Balogun ban decision

The Royal Belgian Football Association (RBFA) has lodged an appeal against FIFA's decision to grant US star forward Folarin Balogun permission to play against the Red Devils despite a red card, less than 24 hours out from the team's Round of 16 game against the United States.

corpus.title: Fußball-WM: Anruf von Trump bei FIFA löst WM-Skandal aus
corpus.signal_text:
Fußball-WM: Anruf von Trump bei FIFA löst WM-Skandal aus

Hat der US-Präsident seine Kontakte zu FIFA-Präsident Infantino genutzt und eine Rot-Sperre gegen einen US-Spieler aufheben lassen? Das US-Team feiert die Entscheidung im "Fall Balogun", andere sind irritiert.

corpus.title: World Cup 2026: Trump, FIFA and the Balogun controversy
corpus.signal_text:
World Cup 2026: Trump, FIFA and the Balogun controversy

One of the few certainties of World Cup football has been rocked after Donald Trump lobbied FIFA to overturn a US red card suspension. The decision has caused outrage but it isn't completely without precedent.

corpus.title: European lawmakers call for probe into Infantino over Trump’s role in Balogun red card suspension
corpus.signal_text:
European lawmakers call for probe into Infantino over Trump’s role in Balogun red card suspension

Lawmakers are urging national football associations to push FIFA’s Ethics Committee to investigate Infantino, including whether pressure by the Trump administration influenced the lifting of the suspension

corpus.title: Injerencia de Trump, “punta del iceberg del deterioro de la FIFA”, dice Javier Tebas
corpus.signal_text:
Injerencia de Trump, “punta del iceberg del deterioro de la FIFA”, dice Javier Tebas

Javier Tebas, presidente de la liga española, se sumó a las críticas contra Gianni Infantino, presidente de la FIFA, debido al escándalo que involucró al estadunidense Folarin Balogun, a quien el máximo organismo de futbol retiró la suspensión por una tarjeta roja luego de que Donald Trump llamara a Infantino para pedir una revisión de la sanción.

corpus.title: FIFA or "Animal Farm"
corpus.signal_text:
FIFA or "Animal Farm"

TEHRAN – Football should never forget the controversy surrounding Folarin Balogun after FIFA apparently broke its own rules by allowing the U.S. striker to play against Belgium in the 2026 FIFA World Cup Round of 16.

corpus.title: How Trump’s call to FIFA tested the limits of rules-based order
corpus.signal_text:
How Trump’s call to FIFA tested the limits of rules-based order

The FIFA decision to suspend Folarin Balogun’s red card is a compact case study in how power can shape the application of rules without ever rewriting them.

corpus.title: FIFA Gives Trump Exactly What He Wants
corpus.signal_text:
FIFA Gives Trump Exactly What He Wants

Reversing a red card against U.S. soccer star Folarin Balogun isn’t FIFA’s only unusual concession to Trump. The post FIFA Gives Trump Exactly What He Wants appeared first on The Intercept.
